name: simflow
description: Codex-native computational simulation domain workflow layer

interface.shortDescription: Computational simulation workflow layer for Codex.
interface.longDescription: SimFlow provides Codex skills and MCP tools for computational simulation research workflows with open recipe/tag guidance, state, artifact lineage, checkpoints, safety gates, handoff discipline, and optional domain helpers.
defaultPrompt: Use SimFlow to plan a VASP computation recipe.
Use SimFlow to build a CP2K simulation plan.
Use SimFlow to inspect simulation outputs.
